storyboard.content: I keep getting tingling and slight numbness in my fingers and toes, especially when I wake up in the morning.
My hands feel clumsy when I try to type or button up my shirts.
I have been dropping things more often than usual lately.
This has been building up gradually over the past four months.
The tingling comes and goes throughout the day and gets in the way of everyday tasks, but I don't have bad pain and I can still get things done.
The tingling is worst in the morning and eases a bit as the day goes on.
